// Test data for development and debugging
export const MOCK_SHOPS = [
    {
        id: "shop_1",
        name: "Jaipur Atelier House",
        slug: "jaipur-atelier-house",
        owner_name: "Aarav Mehta",
        owner_email: "aarav@shoplivebharat.com",
        city: "Ahmedabad",
        country: "India",
        specialty: "Festive lehengas and mirrorwork jackets",
        description: "A family-run atelier curating festive silhouettes, light occasion wear and handcrafted embellishment for live video discovery. Specializing in traditional Gujarati embroidery with modern fusion designs.",
        image_url: "/shop-assets/banner-1.jpg",
        instagram_url: "https://instagram.com/jaipur-atelier",
        is_active: true
    },
    {
        id: "shop_2",
        name: "The Banaras Edit",
        slug: "the-banaras-edit",
        owner_name: "Meera Shah",
        owner_email: "meera@shoplivebharat.com",
        city: "Ahmedabad",
        country: "India",
        specialty: "Silk drapes, jewellery and wedding guest edits",
        description: "A curated saree and accessory house focused on timeless wedding wardrobes for Indians shopping from abroad. Featuring authentic Banarasi silk with Ahmedabad's traditional craftsmanship.",
        image_url: "/shop-assets/womens-banner.jpg",
        instagram_url: "https://instagram.com/banaras-edit",
        is_active: true
    },
    {
        id: "shop_3",
        name: "Ahmedabad Heritage",
        slug: "ahmedabad-heritage",
        owner_name: "Rajesh Patel",
        owner_email: "rajesh@shoplivebharat.com",
        city: "Ahmedabad",
        country: "India",
        specialty: "Traditional Gujarati embroidery and bandhani",
        description: "Preserving Ahmedabad's rich textile heritage through traditional bandhani, tie-and-dye techniques, and intricate hand embroidery. Featuring authentic pieces made by local artisans.",
        image_url: "/shop-assets/banner-2.jpg",
        instagram_url: "https://instagram.com/ahmedabad-heritage",
        is_active: true
    },
    {
        id: "shop_4",
        name: "Modern Threads Ahmedabad",
        slug: "modern-threads-ahmedabad",
        owner_name: "Priya Desai",
        owner_email: "priya@shoplivebharat.com",
        city: "Ahmedabad",
        country: "India",
        specialty: "Contemporary fusion wear with traditional elements",
        description: "Blending modern fashion with traditional Ahmedabad crafts. Creating fusion pieces that appeal to contemporary Indian women while honoring local textile traditions.",
        image_url: "/shop-assets/womens-banner.jpg",
        instagram_url: "https://instagram.com/modern-threads",
        is_active: true
    },
    {
        id: "shop_5",
        name: "Crafted by Ahmedabad",
        slug: "crafted-by-ahmedabad",
        owner_name: "Vikram Singh",
        owner_email: "vikram@shoplivebharat.com",
        city: "Ahmedabad",
        country: "India",
        specialty: "Handwoven textiles and artisan collaborations",
        description: "Showcasing handwoven textiles and direct collaborations with Ahmedabad's artisan community. Each piece tells a story of traditional craftsmanship and sustainable practices.",
        image_url: "/shop-assets/banner-3.jpg",
        instagram_url: "https://instagram.com/crafted-ahmedabad",
        is_active: true
    }
];

export const MOCK_PRODUCTS = [
    // Jaipur Atelier House - Ahmedabad
    {
        id: "prod_1",
        shop_id: "shop_1",
        shop_name: "Jaipur Atelier House",

        slug: "kantha-wrap-jacket",
        category: "Outerwear",
        description: "A hand-finished wrap jacket for festive layering and destination wedding wardrobes. Features intricate kantha embroidery with traditional motifs.",
        price: 6490,
        compare_at_price: 8290,
        currency: "INR",
        image_url: "/shop-assets/products/jacket-3.jpg",
        hover_image_url: "/shop-assets/products/jacket-4.jpg",
        stock: 8,
        badge: "Live Pick",

    },

        shop_name: "Jaipur Atelier House",
        name: "Mirror Work Lehenga",

        description: "Stunning lehenga with mirror work embellishment. Perfect for festivals and celebrations.",
